raw_text: The application crashes immediately every time I sign in with my correct username and password. It happens on every single login attempt.
Signing in makes the whole app close instantly. Enter credentials, hit sign in, and it dies. Reproduces 100% of the time.
Password reset emails never arrive. Users request a reset and the email is never delivered, so they can't get the reset link.
The analytics area feels sluggish lately when I open it.
Something goes wrong around the sign-in screen sometimes.

Two-factor SMS codes arrive 5-10 minutes late and have already expired by the time they reach the user, so they get locked out. Repro: enable 2FA, log out, request an SMS code. Expected: code within seconds. Actual: arrives after expiry. Affects all users on the EU number pool.

Annual subscription invoices show the wrong tax rate for customers in Germany - they are charged 7% VAT instead of 19%. Repro: create a DE customer, generate an annual invoice. Expected: 19% VAT. Actual: 7%. Every DE invoice is affected.

On the iOS app, pull-to-refresh on the feed throws a crash if you pull while a previous refresh is still in flight. Repro: open feed, pull to refresh twice quickly. Expected: second pull ignored. Actual: hard crash. Reproducible on iOS 17.
It's broken.
Doesn't work, please fix.
Error on the page.

Checkout is completely down: every attempt to pay returns a 500 error, so no customer can complete a purchase. Started 20 minutes ago, affects 100% of checkouts across all regions. Repro: add item to cart, go to checkout, pay. Expected: order placed. Actual: 500.

Data loss: saving a document silently drops the last paragraph for all users. Repro: open any doc, add a paragraph, save, reload - the paragraph is gone. Confirmed across accounts. Users are losing work.

Security: any logged-in user can view other users' invoices by changing the invoice ID in the URL. No authorization check. Repro: open /invoices/123, change to /invoices/124, you see someone else's invoice. Confirmed.
The settings page has a bug somewhere, it doesn't feel right when I use it.
There's an issue with notifications, not sure how bad it is.

Search autocomplete suggestions are case-sensitive: typing 'iphone' returns nothing but 'iPhone' works. Repro: search bar, type lowercase brand names. Expected: case-insensitive matches. Actual: no suggestions. Reproducible for all lowercase queries.

PDF export of a report cuts off the last page when the report is longer than 10 pages. Repro: generate a 12-page report, export to PDF. Expected: 12 pages. Actual: 10 pages, last two missing. Reproducible above the 10-page threshold.

Outage: the API gateway is returning 503 for all authenticated endpoints, so the entire product is unusable for every customer right now. Started 5 minutes ago. Repro: any API call with a valid token returns 503.
The dashboard takes forever to load - over twenty seconds of spinner before any chart appears when I navigate to it.
